creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: scheidell
Date: Tue Feb  5 13:23:54 2013
New Revision: 311715
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311715

Log:
  This package provides a unified command line interface to many Amazon Web
  Services.
  The currently supported services include:
  * Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2)
  * Elastic Load Balancing
  * Auto Scaling
  * AWS CloudFormation
  * AWS Elastic Beanstalk
  * Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
  * Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
  * Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS)
  ... and more.
  
  WWW: http://aws.amazon.com/cli/
  
  PR:		ports/174674
  Submitted by:	Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org>

Added:
  head/devel/awscli/
  head/devel/awscli/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/awscli/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/awscli/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/awscli/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Tue Feb  5 13:21:33 2013	(r311714)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Tue Feb  5 13:23:54 2013	(r311715)
@@ -107,6 +107,7 @@
     SUBDIR += avro
     SUBDIR += avro-c
     SUBDIR += avro-cpp
+    SUBDIR += awscli
     SUBDIR += baz
     SUBDIR += bcc
     SUBDIR += bcpp

Added: head/devel/awscli/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/awscli/Makefile	Tue Feb  5 13:23:54 2013	(r311715)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Created by: Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	awscli
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.4
+CATEGORIES=	devel
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=source/a/awscli
+
+MAINTAINER=	alexey@renatasystems.org
+COMMENT=	Universal Command Line Interface for Amazon Web Services
+
+LICENSE=	AL2
+LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/LICENSE.txt
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}botocore>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-botocore \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}six>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-six \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sphinx>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-sphinx \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}tox>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-tox
+
+USE_PYTHON=	2.6+
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/awscli/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/awscli/distinfo	Tue Feb  5 13:23:54 2013	(r311715)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (awscli-0.4.4.tar.gz) = 721eb3188dbc9bbbdb287d40327e8238a33f20d36edaa7874b0543fbdf858f9d
+SIZE (awscli-0.4.4.tar.gz) = 14759

Added: head/devel/awscli/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/awscli/pkg-descr	Tue Feb  5 13:23:54 2013	(r311715)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+This package provides a unified command line interface to many Amazon Web
+Services.
+
+The currently supported services include:
+
+* Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2)
+
+* Elastic Load Balancing
+
+* Auto Scaling
+
+* AWS CloudFormation
+
+* AWS Elastic Beanstalk
+
+* Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
+
+* Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
+
+* Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS)
+
+... and more.
+
+WWW: http://aws.amazon.com/cli/
